sections.heading: DocsAI Admin Prompt Pack
sections.prose:
- Scope: Django admin workflows, deployment readiness, content consistency.
- Core prompt: Add/adjust admin feature with migration safety and auditability.
- Small tasks: model/admin change -> migration check -> tests -> release note.

items.text: Scope: Django admin workflows, deployment readiness, content consistency.
